Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast.datatype

Class DatatypeHelper

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.datatype.DatatypeHelper
public class DatatypeHelper extends Object
This class provides services for building and defining a datatype.

First it provides the way to have unique ID for datatype extensions, as well as correct group ID and extension kind regarding extensions arguments. Then to instantiate type parameters and datatype type for a datatype using a given type which represents the datatype type.

    • instantiate

      public static Map<GivenType,Type> instantiate(TypeConstructorExtension typeCons, GivenType datatypeType, List<GivenType> typeParams, Type givenDTType)
      Returns the map representing the instantiated values for the given types which were representing the datatype type parameters and its type during the datatype construction. The datatype type constructor extension and a given type representing the instantiated datatype type must be provided in order to calculate this map values.
      Parameters:
      typeCons - the datatype type constructor extension
      datatypeType - the given type that was representing the datatype type during datatype construction
      typeParams - the type parameters of the datatype
      givenDTType - the type representing the datatype type instantiated
      Returns:
      the map representing the instantiated values for the given types which were representing the datatype type parameters and its type itself
